chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ الْبَخْتَرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ إِذَا كَانَ لِلرَّجُلِ أَمَةٌ فَزَوَّجَهَا مَمْلُوكَهُ فَرَّقَ بَيْنَهُمَا إِذَا شَاءَ وَ جَمَعَ بَيْنَهُمَا إِذَا شَاءَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hafs Bin al Bakhtary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If there was a slave girl for a man, so he gets her married to an owned slave of him, so he can separate between them when he so desires to, and gathers between them when he so desires to’.
